problem id: 1fd310dc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11101010 -> 01111110
  01010011 -> 11010111
  01000110 -> 01010001
  11100010 -> 00111100
  11110111 -> 10111111
  10010101 -> 01111101
  01001010 -> 00111011
  01101011 -> 01111010
  01101111 -> 01011011

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 00011101
